mapper.sql: select level_id, level_name, level_icon, min_consume_cents, discount_rate, free_deposit, priority_reserve, extra_benefits, sort_num, status, create_time, update_time from fish_member_level
mapper.select: where status = '0' order by min_consume_cents asc
mapper.insert: insert into fish_member_level (level_name, level_icon, min_consume_cents, discount_rate, free_deposit, priority_reserve, extra_benefits, sort_num, status, create_time) values (#{levelName}, #{levelIcon}, #{minConsumeCents}, #{discountRate}, #{freeDeposit}, #{priorityReserve}, #{extraBenefits}, #{sortNum}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from fish_member_level where level_id in #{id}
